description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to enemies in front, knocking them back and reducing their Attack Speed by [250->30% ] and Magic Defense by [30%->35%] for [15 sec->4 sec]. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional Magic Damage.
Deals Magic Damage to 2 enemies and roots them for [6 sec->3.6 sec]. Enemies hit take continuous Magic Damage every 0.5 sec for 6 sec, and their Magic Damage taken is increased by 30%.
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals Magic Damage 5 times. The final hit stuns them for [3 sec->1.8 sec], and if they are not heroes, deals additional Magic Damage.

Critical Hit Chance is increased by 150, and each time you deal damage, you inflict [Lea's Curse] on the target for 10 sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 250 and Attack is reduced by 25%.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but damage dealt is increased by [40%->80%].

dark.unified: Roots the target for [3 sec->1.2 sec]. [20% chance->(added) guaranteed]

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the target is changed to [3 enemies->all enemies].

dark.unified: Root duration is increased by [1.5 sec->0.9 sec].

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by [10%->{2}%]. This effect stacks up to [5->{3}] times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Claw of Restriction] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the affected enemy by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Area of Darkness] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last attack reduces the target’s M.DEF by 30% for 7 sec. [(removed) P.DEF reduction.]

[Black Wind] Attacks enemies inflicted with Curse of Lea every 10 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to 200% of ATK, and increasing own ATK by {0}% for 20 sec per hit enemy. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.
Upon a Critical Hit, reduces Heal Rate of the target by 50% and increases own Crit DMG by {0}% for 10 sec. Crit DMG increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.
